feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I have data like Date, Net, Gross. I want to derive values by Week Range text as dimension
entry.content: My requirement is I have date column and gross, net> I wanted to show week range as text or dimension in display with Gross, Net to show the values for that week. How can I achieve it. My source is csv for now

entry.title: Dynamically Changing Measures in Chart
entry.content:
Hello,

i am trying to resolve the following request: 

We have a combined stack and line chart with two measures inside of it (A1 and A2). 
Now i have two more pairs of measures which are also displayed together (B1 and B2 OR C1 andC2).
So in total i have 6 measures which are displayed in pairs (A1 and A2 OR B1 and B2 ORC1 and C2).  

For now i am using two measure input controls (MI1 and MI2) where i always have to select the pair like measure A1 from MI1 and A2 from MI2. The problem using this way is next to the fact that it is "click intensive" that the sorting is also not working like sorting from highest to lowest. 

Do you have any suggestions how to make dynamic selection of two measures in a chart easier or that we only have one measure input control instead of two?

Kind regards
Korab

entry.title: Calculating Forecast using sum of previous year actuals and input of current month forecast
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where i need to calculate the forecast using below calculation.

Fiscal Yr = Oct to Sep 

We are currently in 202407 

then calculate SUM of Actuals of 2023 of account A / SUM of Actuals of 2023 of account X * Forecast value entered for the respective period on account Y

Forecast months of Account A= Sum of Actuals_Last_Year of Account A / Sum of Actuals_Last_Year of Account X * Forecast input of account Y of current month on which Forecast is being calculated.

I am trying to achieve this using data action as account dimension formula is not able to fulfill this requirement.

I am using prompt for getting the start of the forecast period so that the formula can be applied from there on.

Please can someone suggest how I can aggregate last year actuals of account A and X because I am not able to set the MEMBERSET for DATE dimension as actuals should be taken from last year and the write back should happen on the months starting from the Forecast months 

Please share your thoughts if anyone has implemented similar requirement.

Please let me know if any clarification is needed 

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Sana

entry.title: Transports in SAC - Package file
entry.content:
In SAC Transports, the package file is downloaded as .package file in to my system.

1. Can I open the .package file using any application and read what objects are there in the file?
2. Can I also make changes in the object list that is saved in the .package file?

Thanks & Regards,
Nageswara

entry.title: Blog editor does strange changes
entry.content: If I do a change to my blog draft the editor creates one empty line between the text and code blocks or images respectively. Does anybody know how to prevent this?

entry.title: Show use who last saved public version for an organization
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

In an SAC planning application I do have the requirement to display the users who saved the public version for a member of the organization dimension live.

 

Example for Company Code 1100:

Last Saved: TBINK 22/04/2024 15:09:12

Last Published: TBINK 22/04/2024 15:09:12

 

How can I do this? is there maybe an existing blog that you know? I am sure that I am not the first one to have this requirement but I do only find an option for private versions and not in the context to an organization member.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud for planning SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling @Sap

entry.title: Transformation issue in SAC Data Model
entry.content: I have built a new model with data source as csv. Therw were 7 transformations and I arrived at a final column as output which I need. Now when I m trying to load new data. Model is expecting all the columns to be mapped from source. How to reload the data and proceed further. Please advice.

entry.title: Quantidades das quotização negativa
entry.content:
Bom dia Pessoal!

Estou acessando a transação MEQ1 e ao informar o material e o centro, a trasação está com DUMP.

E a informação que e porque tem quotização negativa, por favor quem pode ajudar para corrigir esse DUMP.

O que devo fazer?

Desde já agradeço pela atenção 

Abraços

entry.title: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

In a SAC story, I tried to create input control based on the calculated measure. 

This measure appeared in the list of available measures 

but didn't filter the table (I wanted only lines with 1 to be present).

The measure calculation refers to the Date dimension. The Date dimension is set up to show unbooked values, nevertheless, the filter didn't work either with booked dates or unbooked ones. 

In addition, another measure above - Age - is also a calculated measure, but it didn't even appear in the list of available ones for the filter.

Please, could you advise what could be the reason for this and how to make things work?

 

Thank you,

Yuri

entry.title: 如何使用钻取
entry.content: 我在设计故事的时候发现，钻取功能是置灰无法选择的。这是为什么？请各位大佬支个招

entry.title: SAC BW live connection: Error Illegal State: data area already existing
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I'm working in SAC MAN with a live connection to BW (BPC), and Stories (optimized) that used to work fine are now giving me random errors like getting stuck loading and not opening, but if I try a second time maybe it works.

To simplify and isolate the problem, I have created a simple story with two tables, each connected to a live model based on a BW query. When I save it and execute the story, I get an error on the screen saying to contact the administrator because the model information was not found. If I go to the browser console, I have this information:

2024-04-23T08:02:57.474Z [ERROR] Failed to create QM for [{"datasetId":"view:[_SYS_BIC][t.3][Cqv88q0nv7fh9o9dgej0kgois2e]"}], reason: Illegal State: Illegal State: data area already existing
at e [as constructor]

I tried with a new model on the same BW queries but the same issue persists. Also, I have also tried regenerating the query in RSRT. It is the development tenant in SAC with version 2024.2.21.

BW Live Connections is a BW on HANA system.

Do you have any idea about this error in the console?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Need Info on System Owner Permissions for SAC,DSP
entry.content: Hey everyone, we’re currently examining the permissions for SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere and are trying to understand how these differ from other roles. Our main focus is identifying tasks that specifically require System Owner permissions. For example, we’re aware that only system owners have the authority to modify settings like SSO and SAML. However, our documentation doesn't provide a clear outline of all the exclusive tasks and limitations. Can anyone provide insights on what exactly system owners can do that others can't? Any guidance or pointers would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using stories with optimized design experience. We want to set them in Embed mode. We did that in 

View Time Toolbar Settings.

Unfortunately, when we apply and save the story, the embed parameter is reset to view and story is launched in view mode.

Have I missed something ?

Thanks in advance

Mat

entry.title: Allocation of multiple hierarchies from parent node to child nodes
entry.content:
Hello SAC Community,

I have combined and mapped two different account hierarchies into one with budget accounts being the parent of the regular G/L Accounts.

On the budget accounts, they type a top-down number for internal allocations. These allocations needs to be allocated from the parent (budget account) to the child nodes (G/L Acccounts). It looks like below:

I need to allocate the -1000 on 9010BU to the below G/L account child nodes based on the distribution of the Cost Type = Original. Furthermore, it needs to be done for every member in the Cost Center dimension.

I have tried the below code, where I have made an attribute called "Allocation" in the Account dimension "ACCOUNT_GL_BU" filled with some text for the child nodes (G/L Accounts) of the "Internal Shares" budget accounts (G/L Accounts).

 

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "COST"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/START_DATE_PLAN] TO [d/Version].[p/END_DATE_PLAN]
MEMBERSET [d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = BASEMEMBER([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU].[h/BU_HIERARCHY], "BU_ACCOUNT_PLAN")
 MEMBERSET [d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = ("INTERNAL_ALLOC", "ORIGINAL")
VARIABLEMEMBER #AGGREGATED_ORIGINAL OF [d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU]
VARIABLEMEMBER #AGGREGATED_ALLOCATION OF [d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU]
IF [d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU].[p/Allocation] != "" THEN
DATA([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = #AGGREGATED_ORIGINAL) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = "ORIGINAL", [d/Version] = "public.Final Allocation")
DATA([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = #AGGREGATED_ALLOCATION) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = "INTERNAL_ALLOC", [d/Version] = "public.Final Allocation")
 DATA([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = #AGGREGATED_ALLOCATION) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = "INTERNAL_ALLOC", [d/Version] = "public.Final Allocation")
DATA([d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = "INTERNAL_ALLOC") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_COST_TYPE] = "ORIGINAL", [d/Version] = "public.Final Allocation") / RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = #AGGREGATED_ORIGINAL)) * RESULTLOOKUP([d/HUSQ_ACCOUNT_GL_BU] = #AGGREGATED_ALLOCATION)
ENDIF

And finally here is an excel file of the idea:

Any help is appreciated!

entry.title: Can we change material availability date in Sales order Item level -> scheduling line -> Shippingtab
entry.content:
Hi All

Is there any way in standard to change the material availability date in past ( where stock is available in MMBE) in SAP sales order. 

Please suggest .. I tried but failed to change the material availability date.

Best Regards

SAP learner.

entry.title: Sac Dimension Comment
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

i am using dimension comments but I can't retrieve them in other tables, is this the default behaviour? is there a way to copy comment using javascript?

thanks a lot

Rosanna

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content:
Precog is an approved and widely used data integration solution that makes it easy to get data from Ariba, SuccessFactors, Concur, Fieldglass, CX, S/4 HANA, Business One, Marketing Cloud, and more (2000+ SaaS APIs) into Datasphpere (and other data warehouses/databases): ELT for Datasphere.

Here's a good overview (video) of the AI-driven, no-code data integration (ELT) solution: Precog An SAP BTP Story

entry.title: I have a date column and I want to derive Week range
entry.content: I have a date column and I want to derive Week range for that column considering Monday-Saturday as first day and last day of the week. I tried the same in transformations it did work but. It fails when loading the data. It asks for transformation to map. Need some steps to achieve this

entry.title: SAC: Find drill level in hierarchy based on string
entry.content:
I would like the user to chose an organisational unit in a hierarchy and then the chart should depict the corresponding drill level with the node expanded.

getHierarchyLevel - just gives me the selected level 

Analytics Designer API Reference Guide Version 2024.2 (sap.com)

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filters on Date and Version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

currently I am working with Advanced Filters. I want to set the Filter based on Date and Version. Like you can see in the image:

The outcome does not meet my excpectation:

As you can see "2 Forecast III" is also shown in the years 2022, 2023 and 2024 (not in image). But my expectation was that for "2 Forecast III" only 2024 is shown.

What is the issue in this case?

Kind regards,

Ismail
